bird.name: 马岛冢雉
bird.summary: 马岛塚雉或密克罗尼西亚塚雉（学名：Megapodius laperouse）是一种生活在西太平洋的受威胁的塚雉。 描述 马岛塚雉是一种体型粗壮的中型鸟类，其身长可达38厘米。这种鸟羽毛多为深棕黑色，头部比身体颜色更浅，有浅灰色的羽冠、黄色的喙和暗黄色的后肢。其面部皮肤呈红色，透…

locations.name: 太平洋
locations.summary: 太平洋（英語：Pacific Ocean）是地球上五大洋中面積最大的洋，面積約為1.65億平方公里，從北冰洋一直延伸至南冰洋，西側為亞洲，西南為大洋洲，東面為美洲。它覆蓋了地球約46%的水面和32%的總面積，超過所有陸地面積的總和。赤道將…

relations.subject: 马岛冢雉
relations.evidence: laperouse (Gaimard, 1823)Marianas scrubfowl }} thumb|Micronesian megapode on the island of Sarigan The Micronesian megapode or Micronesian scrubfowl (Megapodius laperouse) is a megapode which inhabits islands of the Western Pacific Ocean

relations.subject: 马岛冢雉
relations.evidence: Given the multiple threats across its range, it is likely to be suffering from a continuing decline. It seems that the only way for the species to be safe is to protect a few small islands and release a small population of megapodes there
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
